task: Refactored goals.py from markdown to JSONL format with append-only semantics and UUID-based goal tracking
discussion_summary: Session focused on migrating the goals system from markdown (goals.md with regex parsing) to structured JSONL (goals.jsonl) to enable reliable multi-developer state management and append-only updates. Investigated daemon PID tracking and session lifecycle hooks to understand how claude_session.pid is written and monitored. The goals.py refactor is incomplete—the file was truncated mid-function at line 262 during the load_open_goals() implementation.

accomplishments.what: Converted goals.py data model from markdown sections to JSONL with per-goal UUID, status field, and ISO timestamps
Implemented _read_all() with append-only conflict resolution (last entry per ID wins)
Rewrote add_goal() to append structured JSON entries instead of parsing/modifying markdown
Implemented complete_goal() and new discard_goal() using append-only pattern
Investigated daemon PID tracking and session_start hook for claude_session.pid writing

in_progress.what: load_open_goals() function truncated mid-implementation at line 262—needs completion to filter and return open goal texts

next_actions.action: Complete load_open_goals() in goals.py—finish the list comprehension to return goal texts where status is 'open' or 'backlog'
next_actions.why: Function is truncated and will cause import/runtime errors; blocking any code that calls load_open_goals()

next_actions.action: Add remaining goal accessor functions: load_done_goals(), load_backlog_goals(), get_goal_by_id(), and update_goal_metadata()
next_actions.why: Other modules likely depend on these; refactor is incomplete without full API

next_actions.action: Update all callers of goals.py (grep for 'from askr.state.goals import' and 'import askr.state.goals') to use new JSONL-based API
next_actions.why: Old markdown-based functions (e.g., _strip_ts, _section_lines) no longer exist; callers will break

next_actions.action: Migrate existing goals.md to goals.jsonl using a one-time migration script or manual conversion
next_actions.why: State file format changed; old data must be converted or will be lost

next_actions.action: Commit goals.py refactor and update .gitattributes if goals.jsonl needs merge strategy (e.g., union or custom driver)
next_actions.why: Append-only JSONL may benefit from conflict-free merge handling in multi-developer scenarios

decisions.decision: Switched goals storage from markdown (goals.md) to JSONL (goals.jsonl)
decisions.reason: JSONL enables append-only updates, UUID-based deduplication, and conflict-free merging in multi-developer workflows; markdown regex parsing is fragile

decisions.decision: Used append-only pattern with 'last entry per ID wins' for goal updates
decisions.reason: Avoids locking and read-modify-write races; aligns with team.json and decisions.jsonl patterns already in codebase

decisions.decision: Added 'status' field (open, backlog, done, discarded) instead of parsing checkbox syntax
decisions.reason: Explicit status is queryable, sortable, and less error-prone than regex on markdown checkboxes

decisions.decision: Used ISO 8601 UTC timestamps (_now_iso()) instead of local time strings
decisions.reason: Consistent with team coordination across timezones; matches recent decisions.py and blockers.py refactors

failed_approaches.approach: Investigated claude_session.pid writing in daemon and session_start hook
failed_approaches.reason: Tangential to goals refactor; session ended before this investigation yielded actionable findings

relational_files.why: Recently refactored to JSONL; goals.py now follows same pattern
Also uses append-only JSONL; goals.py mirrors its data model
Provides state_path() and ensure_state_dir() used by goals.py
May call add_goal() or load_open_goals() to initialize session state
CLI commands likely expose goal management; needs update for new API

blockers: goals.py load_open_goals() is truncated at line 262; will cause import errors until completed
